case_title: PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. vs. SO, SUNG EUN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SO, SUNG EUN SUH, IN-HEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 125 CAMBON DRIVE #11-C, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE - CRC 522.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SO, SUNG EUN SUH, IN-HEE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. JUDGMENT OF AUG-09-1995 SET ASIDE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SO, SUNG EUN SUH, IN-HEE DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED MANAGEMENT CORP. SERVED JUL-30-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SO, SUNG EUN SUH, IN-HEE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 125 CAMBON DR, #11-C, SF, CA $470.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $470.00, LEASE FORFEITED, NO STAYS OR CLAIMS OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION SHALL BE SOUGHT OR PERMITTED.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
